providers.name: Logan Pierce
providers.specialty: Lo-fi hip-hop, boom-bap, and warm analog mixing
providers.bio: Grammy-nominated mix engineer who has shaped the dusty, tape-saturated sound of countless lo-fi and boom-bap records. Specializes in keeping vocals intimate and drums punchy without losing warmth.

providers.name: Priya Nadkarni
providers.specialty: Pop and electronic clarity, vocal-forward radio mixes
providers.bio: Mix engineer behind multiple Top-40 singles. Known for glassy, competitive pop mixes that translate across earbuds and club systems alike.

providers.name: Marcus Webb
providers.bio: Mixes loud, guitar-driven records with a wide, aggressive stereo image. Former FOH engineer who brings live energy into the studio.

providers.name: Sound Forge Mastering
providers.specialty: Streaming-loudness mastering for hip-hop and lo-fi
providers.bio: Boutique mastering house tuned for Spotify, Apple Music, and YouTube loudness targets. Delivers warm, glued masters with fast turnaround and unlimited revisions.

providers.name: Helena Brandt
providers.bio: Mastering engineer with a fully analog chain and dedicated vinyl cutting experience. The go-to for artists who want dynamics preserved and a premium physical release.

providers.name: Apex Audio Labs
providers.specialty: High-volume, fast mastering for indie releases
providers.bio: Affordable, reliable mastering for independent artists shipping on a schedule. Great value for EPs and album campaigns that need consistency across many tracks.

providers.name: Sora Lin
providers.specialty: Hand-illustrated lo-fi and anime-inspired cover art
providers.bio: Illustrator whose nostalgic, study-beats aesthetic defines a generation of lo-fi playlist covers. Delivers print and streaming-ready artwork plus animated loops.

providers.name: Dust & Pixel Studio
providers.specialty: 3D render and surreal digital cover art
providers.bio: Design studio creating bold, high-concept 3D visuals for forward-thinking artists. Full visual package including single, canvas, and social cut-downs.

providers.name: Camille Dubois
providers.specialty: Photography-led art direction and band imagery
providers.bio: Photographer and art director specializing in moody, editorial band portraiture and full cover-art direction for physical and digital releases.

providers.name: Andre Castellano
providers.specialty: Vocal comping, tuning, and adlib production
providers.bio: Vocal producer who turns rough takes into polished, emotive performances. Expert at natural-sounding tuning, stacks, and harmony arrangement.

providers.name: Mei Tanaka
providers.bio: Topliner and vocal arranger with cuts across J-pop and global dance. Brings hooks and harmony ideas that elevate a track from demo to release.

providers.name: Resonant Sync Agency
providers.bio: Boutique sync agency with active relationships at major streaming networks and ad houses. Lo-fi and chill instrumentals are their highest-converting catalog.

providers.name: Greenlight Music Licensing
providers.bio: Sync team focused on interactive media and trailers. Strong fit for high-energy and cinematic tracks looking for game and brand placements.

providers.name: Nightloop Visuals
providers.bio: Motion studio creating seamless animated loops and lyric visualizers perfect for YouTube and streaming canvases. Ideal for lo-fi and ambient releases.

providers.name: Riley Okafor
providers.bio: Director crafting cinematic narrative and performance videos. Full pre-production through color grade for artists ready for a flagship visual.

providers.name: Wavelength Playlist Promo
providers.bio: Promotion team with direct curator relationships across study, chill, and focus playlists. Transparent reporting and ethical, non-bot placements only.

providers.name: Echo Social Lab
providers.bio: Short-form marketing agency that seeds tracks with creators to drive UGC and viral moments. Strongest fit for hook-driven, danceable records.

providers.name: Theo Marchetti
providers.specialty: Live keys, Rhodes, and jazz chords
providers.bio: Session keyboardist who adds the human, jazzy chord voicings and Rhodes textures that give lo-fi records their soul. Records broadcast-quality stems remotely.

providers.name: Ana Sofia Reyes
providers.bio: Violinist and arranger who writes and records lush string sections remotely. Brings emotional lift and cinematic scale to any production.
